description: Needs proof, guarantees, and predictability before committing. Asks detailed what-if questions. May go silent after positive meeting while seeking internal certainty.
top_fears: property gets damaged and I am left out of pocket
income is not reliable month to month
losing control over my own property
not being able to access property when I need it
top_questions: What happens if a guest damages the property?
What is your average occupancy rate?
Can I block out dates for personal use?
How quickly do you respond to maintenance issues?
What happens if you cannot fill my calendar?
What does your management agreement say exactly?
what_resonates: 250 pound guest damage waiver per booking
real booking calendars shown as proof
6-month exit clause framed as safety net not lock-in
zero upfront fees removes financial risk of trying
direct messaging between Zac and each guest
what_to_avoid: vague or optimistic income promises without data
rushing to close before all questions answered
ideal_response_pattern: Acknowledge the fear explicitly then provide the concrete mechanism that prevents it then give a real example then restate the protection in plain language
closing_approach: Document-led close: offer to send management agreement so they can review exact terms. No pressure. Follow up in 5-7 days with a specific question about what they need to feel ready.
typical_blockers: needs to speak to partner before deciding
wants to review full contract terms
waiting for confidence in income projections
wants to see proof of occupancy from similar properties
follow_up_strategy: Send management agreement plus one example occupancy calendar from a comparable property. Subject line: The exact terms, no pressure to sign. Follow up call in 7 days.

notable_leads.name: Kiran Kaur
notable_leads.note: Hospital proximity gave certainty about demand. Responded well to occupancy data.

notable_leads.name: Haider Ali
notable_leads.note: Multiple reassurance questions. Responded well to damage protection detail.

notable_leads.name: Rona
notable_leads.note: Needs to furnish first. Certainty seeker will want proof of returns before furnishing spend.

notable_leads.name: Kuldip Sanghera
notable_leads.note: Revised entry. Had questions about tenant exit timeline.

notable_leads.name: Abby Thomas
notable_leads.note: Second meeting. Needs certainty on income before tenant leaves.
